failure.issue_list_content: positive explanatory audit notes, not blocking defects
failure.validator_error: support review verdict contradicts its fields
failure.root_cause: The v3 schema reused the field name issues for both blocking conditions and explanatory audit prose. The prompt required an issues list but did not provide a separate notes field, so Fable populated every issues list with positive explanations while returning PASS and all booleans true. The validator correctly treated nonempty issues as blocking and failed closed.

general_contract_correction: replace each fact-level issues list with blocking_issues plus a separate notes string
derive PASS only from booleans and empty blocking_issues
retain exact multipage citation-page equality and support-equivalent set enumeration
test that positive notes are allowed on PASS and nonempty blocking_issues are not
run no more than one fresh small cohort before deciding whether to abandon this planner line

frontier_roles.economic_planner: gpt-5.6-terra low only after every frontier gate
